title: Rahsaan Patterson at City Winery Atlanta
location: City Winery Atlanta, 987 City Parkside Dr NE
description: Neo-soul singer Rahsaan Patterson brings his smooth vocals and romantic energy to City Winery. Perfect for couples who love intimate R&B vibes. Wine pairings available. Doors open early for pre-show drinks.

title: Latin Vibes at Tago Life Center
description: Tropical Latin Night with salsa, bachata, and merengue. Great for couples who want to learn or show off dance moves. Sizzling rhythms, vibrant energy, and non-stop dancing. Beginner-friendly atmosphere.

title: Resurgence: The Rise of Atlanta on the Global Stage
description: An exhibit celebrating Atlanta's emergence as a global hub — tech, culture, and creativity. Great cultural date idea. Wine and bites provided. Conversation-starting art and installations.

title: Amplify Decatur Festival
description: 4-day festival debuting a new concert stage. Live music, local vendors, and community vibes. Perfect for a daytime date with evening concerts. Pet-friendly, great food trucks on site.

title: Bert Kreischer: Permission to Party
location: Gas South Arena, 6400 Rice Lake Pkwy, Duluth
description: Comedy superstar Bert Kreischer brings his legendary party energy. Hilarious, high-energy standup perfect for couples who laugh together. Great date night for comedy fans. Big venue, full bar.

title: Jess Hilarious at Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, 1950 N 12th St, Atlanta
description: Jess Hilarious brings big energy comedy to Atlanta's premier comedy club. Weekend shows perfect for date night. Full bar service, great small venue vibe. 21+ only.

title: Best of Atlanta Comedy Showcase
location: Laughing Skull Lounge, 878 Main St SW, Atlanta
description: Top Atlanta comedians in one show. Laughing Skull is intimate and consistently funny. Great cheap date idea — only $20-25 per person. Arrive early for best seats.

title: Marcia Wood Gallery Opening — Susan Ker-Seymer
location: Marcia Wood Gallery, 585 White St SW, Atlanta
description: Art gallery opening with wine and mingling. Sophisticated date vibe — great for couples who appreciate contemporary art. Free admission, all ages welcome.

title: LINES OF PLAY — 30+ Artist Group Exhibition at ABV Gallery
description: Massive group show celebrating World Cup with 30+ artists. Vibrant, energetic opening with great crowds. Perfect for couples who love art, sports, and culture. Free admission.

title: Sam Salem — In The Other Room at Helium
location: Helium Comedy Club, 1950 N 12th St, Atlanta
description: Sam Salem brings clever, observational comedy to Helium's intimate side room. Great alternative to the main shows. Late-night energy, solid date night comedy.

title: Corinne Bailey Rae — 20th Anniversary Tour
location: Buckhead Theatre, 3110 Roswell Rd NE, Atlanta
description: British soul queen celebrating 20 years of her iconic catalog. Romantic, smooth live music perfect for couples. Great vocals, intimate theater setting. Dinner nearby in Buckhead recommended.

title: Salsa Social at Callanwolde Fine Arts Center
location: Callanwolde Fine Arts Center, 980 Lawrence St NE, Atlanta
description: Cuban music and dancing at the historic Callanwolde Mansion. Live band, dance floor, and beautiful grounds. Romantic setting for couples. All skill levels welcome — great energy.

title: Love and Music — A Romantic Concert Experience
description: VIP Cocktail Hour at 7:30, Romantic Piano Concert at 8:30. Specifically designed for couples — immersive love and music theme. Perfect anniversary or special date night.

title: High Notes ATL — Rose Weeknd by Fine Wine Series
description: Rose wine and live music pairing experience. Sophisticated date vibes with curated wine and live performances. Rooftop or upscale indoor setting. Great for couples who love wine and good tunes.

title: Juneteenth Atlanta Parade & Music Festival — Vegetarian Food Vendors 10x10
description: 14th Annual Juneteenth celebration in Piedmont Park. 10 vegetarian food vendors, live music, parade. Cultural richness and amazing food. Great for couples who love food and history.

title: STAMPED: AYA x Friends — Amapiano & Afrobeats
description: Afrobeats, Amapiano, and more. High energy dance party with Atlanta's best. Door fee, drinks, and non-stop dancing. Great for couples who love international beats and club vibes.

title: Reggae on the Rooftop Festival — Juneteenth Weekend
description: Rooftop reggae festival for Juneteenth weekend. Vibey outdoor party with island beats, food, and drinks. Perfect Saturday afternoon date — sunset vibes and good music.

title: Green Market at Piedmont Park
description: Weekly farmers market in Piedmont Park. Fresh local produce, artisan goods, vegetarian options. Great morning date — walk the park, grab coffee, shop local.
